run: group1 re-cert batch 3 (rc3) — Papers 29,39,40,50,52 + synthesis (results backbone), 2026-06-19
note: C5/C11/C13/C14/C15 are deterministic, run separately on real corpus (no per-run LLM calibration). The 4 seeds below calibrate the 4 LLM dimensions (claims / citation / code / synthesis).

seeds.class: C8 — flipped the honestly-named gap 'A fully rank-uniform analytical proof is a named gap' to 'is now complete (Theorem ...)'. The rank-uniform 4/pi analytical proof is OPEN (rank-1 rigorous, rank<=2 numerical); only the C3(G)=1 PRV asymptotic-tightness is established (do NOT conflate — that is control M3).

C4 — Matsuura-Ohta 'Kazakov-Migdal model on graphs and the Ihara zeta function' (JHEP 09 (2022) 178) bibitem arXiv corrupted 2204.06424 -> 2210.06424 (a wrong ID; the LLM citation reviewer must web-verify the ID resolves to the claimed paper). Bibitem-only (no inline counterpart) so C15 does not apply.
C2 — the scalar KPS F-theorem bit-exact assertion 'assert abs(F_s - _F_s_kps()) < 10**(-40)' gutted to '< 10**(40)' (vacuous; any value passes, defeats the bit-exact check).

C9 — Paper 50 status overstated from 'reproduces the KPS sphere F-theorem bit-exactly from the framework spectrum' (an arithmetic match) to 'derives the KPS sphere F-theorem from a conformal field theory calculation' (a CFT derivation — the C8 'arithmetic fact, not a CFT derivation' honesty line).
seeds.anchor:
derives
the Klebanov--Pufu--Sachdev sphere F-theorem from a conformal field
theory calculation

controls_must_not_flag_material.what: p29 Ramanujan bound + integer-algebraic Ihara zeta zeros (no pi/transcendental in the Ihara polynomial factorizations) — genuine, must NOT be flagged.
p39 C3 -> sqrt(2) triangle correction (the v4.25.0 B3 keystone fix; Pythagorean <1 was withdrawn) + k-fold -> sqrt(k) sketch — genuine, must NOT be flagged as wrong/overclaim.

p40 rank-1 rigorous 4/pi AND the C3(G)=1 PRV asymptotic-tight-at-all-ranks result (Theorem prv_summand_bound) — both genuine; distinct from the rank-uniform 4/pi ANALYTICAL proof (which is the named gap = seed S-claims-C8). Must NOT flag the PRV tightness as overclaim.
p50 bit-exact KPS sphere F-theorem ARITHMETIC match (S3 and S5; KPS value log2/8 - 3 zeta(3)/(16 pi^2)) — genuine, must NOT be flagged.
p52 Category III discretization correspondence at the state-space GH level (framework analog of holography) — genuine, must NOT be flagged as overclaim.
